Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT BRIAN MENDEL DEMURRER TO AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend to allege how USF would not have acted as it did, if it had known of the concealed or suppressed information. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
